name: Pasta with Goat Cheese and Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and scrape the asparagus. Slice the spears at a 45-degree angle to create 1/4 inch lengths.
2. Bring 3 quarts of water to a boil in a kettle. Add the fettuccine and cook vigorously for 9 to 12 minutes, until al dente. Do not overcook; reserve 1/4 cup of the cooking water before draining the pasta.
3. Melt the butter in the kettle. Add the asparagus and sauté for about 1 minute. Then add the fettuccine, goat cheese, chives, and pepper. Pour in the reserved water. Toss well and serve.
